[[commons:Category:Asadatehiko-jinja]][[ja:朝立彦神社]] {{Expand Japanese|朝立彦神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Asadatehiko Shrine | native_name = 朝立彦神社 | image = Asadatehiko jinja.JPG | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Asadatehiko Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|33.955481|134.538575}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] | deity = {{ill|Toyotama-hime|qid=Q2329261|lt=Toyotama-hime|de|Toyotama-hime|en|Toyotama-hime|es|Toyotama-hime|fa|تویوتاما-هیمه|fi|Otohime|fr|Otohime|id|Toyotama-hime|ja|トヨタマヒメ|ko|도요타마히메|mni|ꯇꯣꯌꯣꯇꯃ-ꯍꯤꯃꯦ|pl|Toyotama-hime|ru|Тоётама-химэ|simple|Toyotama-hime|sv|Otohime|uk|Тойотама-хіме|vi|Toyotama-hime|zh|豐玉毘賣命|qid=Q2329261|1=Toyotama-hime}} }} {{nihongo|'''Asadatehiko Shrine'''|朝立彦神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Hiteisha|lt=Shikinai Hiteisha|ja|比定社|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|Q11657514|ltq=Q11657514|qid=Q11657514|1=List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)}} ** Series ordinal: 36 ** P155: {{ill|Q11449442|ltq=Q11449442|qid=Q11449442|1=Umorihiko Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Hayasame Shrine|lt=Hayasame Shrine|ja|速雨神社|qid=Q48758380|1=Hayasame Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Q207309|ltq=Q207309|qid=Q207309|1=Tokushima (city)}} * {{ill|Q907457|ltq=Q907457|qid=Q907457|1=Awa Province (Tokushima)}} * {{ill|Katsuura District, Tokushima|lt=Katsuura district|en|Katsuura District, Tokushima|es|Distrito de Katsuura|fr|District de Katsuura|id|Distrik Katsuura, Tokushima|it|Distretto di Katsuura|ja|勝浦郡|ko|가쓰우라군|no|Katsuura|pl|Powiat Katsuura|uk|Повіт Кацуура|zh|勝浦郡|qid=Q1119478|1=Katsuura District, Tokushima}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|33.955481|134.538575}} == image (P18) == * Asadatehiko jinja.JPG == dedicated to (P825) == * {{ill|Toyotama-hime|qid=Q2329261|lt=Toyotama-hime|de|Toyotama-hime|en|Toyotama-hime|es|Toyotama-hime|fa|تویوتاما-هیمه|fi|Otohime|fr|Otohime|id|Toyotama-hime|ja|トヨタマヒメ|ko|도요타마히메|mni|ꯇꯣꯌꯣꯇꯃ-ꯍꯤꯃꯦ|pl|Toyotama-hime|ru|Тоётама-химэ|simple|Toyotama-hime|sv|Otohime|uk|Тойотама-хіме|vi|Toyotama-hime|zh|豐玉毘賣命|qid=Q2329261|1=Toyotama-hime}} == Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) == * 183210 ** P3831: {{ill|Q135159299|ltq=Q135159299|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Q134917284|ltq=Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: {{ill|Shinto Directive|lt=Shinto Directive|en|Shinto Directive|fa|بخشنامه شینتو|fr|Directive shinto|id|Pengarahan Shinto|ja|神道指令|zh|神道指令|qid=Q3029647|1=Shinto Directive}} == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == name in kana (P1814) == * あさだてひこじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 4480005001470 == Commons category (P373) == * Asadatehiko-jinja == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '徳島県徳島市飯谷町小竹101', 'language': 'ja'} {{commons category|Category:Asadatehiko-jinja}} [[JA:朝立彦神社]] {{wikidata link|Q11517708}} == Japanese content == {{Shrine |Name = Asadatehiko Shrine |Image = [[File:Asadatehiko jinja.JPG|250px|Asadatehiko Shrine Main Hall]] |Location = {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|qid=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Tokushima City|Q207309|qid=Q207309|1=Tokushima (city)}}{{ill|lt=Iidani Town|Q11666679|qid=Q11666679|1=Iitani-chō}}Kotake 101 |Coordinates = {{Wikicoord2 deg min sec|33|57|19.91|N|134|32|18.81|E|region:JP-36_type:landmark|display=inline,title}} |Enshrined deity = {{ill|qid=Q2329261|lt=Toyotama-hime|Q2329261|qid=Q2329261|lt=Toyotamabiko no Mikoto|1=Toyotama-hime}} |Shrine rank = Former {{ill|lt=Village shrine|Q134917284|qid=Q134917284|1=Son-sha}}
{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}} |Established = Unknown |Main hall = |Other names = |Annual festival = |Rituals = |Map = {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=Asadatehiko Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=10|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=220}} }} '''Asadatehiko Shrine''' (Asadatehiko-jinja) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} located in {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|qid=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima City|Q207309|qid=Q207309|1=Tokushima (city)}}, {{ill|lt=Iidani Town|Q11666679|qid=Q11666679|1=Iitani-chō}}. === History === [[File:Okameiwa rock Asadatehiko jinja.JPG|thumb|Okame Stone at Okame Pond]] It was formerly called Goō Gongen, but in {{ill|lt=Meiji 4|Q11512280|qid=Q11512280|1=Meiji – year 4}} it was renamed Asadatehiko Shrine. In the {{ill|lt=Awa-shi|Q65291985|qid=Q65291985|1=Awa-shi}}, it is written: “It enshrines Watatsumi Toyotamahiko no Mikoto. Located in Iidani Village, it is commonly called Gongen.” In the “Kanpō Revised Shrine Register,” it is recorded as “Iidani Village Goō Daigongen, bettō Iidani Village Daigo-ji.” It has been revered as a rain-invoking deity of this region. Within the precincts there is a rock cavity a little over two shaku deep called “Okame Pond,” which never dries up throughout the year, and it is said that rain-prayer rituals were performed there. It is located at an elevation of 700 meters on {{ill|lt=Hiraishi Mountain (Tokushima Prefecture)|Q11483443|qid=Q11483443|lt=Hiraishi Mountain|1=Hiraishi Mountain}}, and the surrounding area is designated as {{ill|lt=Higashiyama Gorge Prefectural Natural Park|Q5753973|qid=Q5753973|1=Higashi Sankei Prefectural Natural Park}}. === Enshrined deity === * {{ill|qid=Q2329261|lt=Toyotama-hime|Q2329261|qid=Q2329261|lt=Toyotamabiko no Mikoto|1=Toyotama-hime}} === Access === * From in front of {{ill|lt=Shikoku Railway Company|Q496531|qid=Q496531|lt=JR|1=Shikoku Railway Company}} {{ill|lt=Tokushima Station|Q860775|qid=Q860775|1=Tokushima Station}}, take the {{ill|lt=Tokushima Bus|Q11489648|qid=Q11489648|1=Tokushima Bus}} Katsura Line and get off at “Nagabashira,” then walk about 60 minutes. === External links === * [http://www.awanavi.jp/article/0002035.html Asadatehiko Shrine – Awa Navi] {{Shinto}} {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Asadatehiko Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Asadatehiko Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Asadatehiko Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Tokushima, Tokushima]] [[Category:徳島県の旧村社]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]]
